name: Glazed Baby Carrots with Aerated Herb Foam
description: A modernist side dish using vacuum compression to intensify flavor and nitrous-oxide aeration for a delicate herb foam.

steps.instruction: Peel and trim the carrots, then place them in a vacuum pouch with butter, thyme, and sea salt.
Use the Chamber Vacuum Sealer on its highest setting to collapse the cell structure and infuse the aromatics.
steps.note: This creates a dense, translucent appearance.

steps.instruction: Submerge the pouch in a water bath regulated by a Thermal Immersion Circulator at 84�C (183�F) for 45�60 minutes.
Blanch and shock the herbs, then blend with vegetable stock and heavy cream to create the foam base.
Pass the herb mixture through a Micro-Fine Mesh Sieve.
steps.note: The liquid must be perfectly smooth to avoid clogging the siphon.

steps.instruction: Pour the liquid into a Siphon, charge with one N2O cartridge, and shake vigorously.
Keep the siphon warm in a 50�C (122�F) water bath until ready to serve.
Remove carrots from the pouch and briefly sear in a hot pan for 30 seconds using the pouch juices to create a glossy glaze.
Plating: Arrange the carrots on a plate and dispense a cloud of herb foam alongside them.
